title: Blink Charging Q1 2026 Financial Results Announcement
text: Blink Charging Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Key Announcement: Blink Charging NASDAQ BLNK announced Q1 2026 financial results on May 11, 2026, highlighting operational improvements despite modest revenue growth. Core Financial Metrics. Revenue Performance: Total revenue: $20.8 million up 0.3% YoY, Service revenue: $13.3 million up 25% YoY, now 64.2% of total, Product revenue: $6.2 million down 26.1% YoY. Profitability Metrics: Net loss: $11.6 million improved 45% from $21.0M in Q1 2025, Loss per share: $0.08 versus $0.21 prior year, GAAP gross margin: 32.0%, Non-GAAP gross margin: 42.4% up 213 basis points YoY. Operational Highlights: Operating expenses: $18.4 million down 35% YoY, Operating cash flow: $0.7 million positive versus -$13.0M prior year, Non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA loss: $5.1 million improved 65% YoY. Balance Sheet: Cash and equivalents: $38.0 million, Zero debt outstanding, Stockholders' equity: $54.0 million. Full-Year Guidance: Management reaffirmed 2026 revenue guidance of $105–$115 million with approximately 35% GAAP gross margin. Market Response: Stock declined 5.86% on announcement day though the quarter demonstrated significant operational progress.
